reasoning: The ensures clause `sll.arr_seq@.len() == N` follows directly from `array_wf()` which states `self.arr_seq@.len() == N`. This PHI proves a trivial consequence of array_wf and says nothing about the missing bounds check on index in set_next/set_prev.
The ensures clause `new_sll.get_node_ref(w) == old_sll.get_node_ref(w)` is already present verbatim in the requires. This is a trivially tautological PHI that proves nothing about the spec.
